new.name: cpanel-cve-41940-detector
new.description: Read-only cPanel CVE-2026-41940 IOC detector for .sorry ransomware, Mr_Rot13 Filemanager backdoors, C2 callbacks, cron, SSH, and logs.

new.name: CVE-2008-1930
new.description: CVE-2008-1930 is a critical improper authentication vulnerability affecting the core cookie integrity mechanism in WordPress version 2.5. It allows remote attackers to bypass security controls, forge authentication cookies, and gain unauthorized administrator privileges on an affected website.

new.name: ESAPI-SQLinjection-CVE-2025-5878-Exploit
new.description: 针对ESAPI 的ESAPI.encoder().encodeForSQL()方法，OracleCodec对象的sql 时间盲注利用

new.name: CVE-2018-16763
new.description: Python tool for analyzing CVE-2018-16763 in FUEL CMS with cleaner response parsing and interactive vulnerability checking.
